base_read._comment: Good goal plans reach base table HRG_GOAL_PLANS_B; the name lives in HRG_GOAL_PLANS_TL (US). Read by prefix on the goal plan name -- unambiguous, no existing plan name starts with a numeric run prefix. GOAL_PLAN_ID present = created in base. The bad row (invalid GoalPlanTypeCode) never reaches base, so its name returns no row.
base_read.sql: SELECT tl.goal_plan_name AS GP_NAME, gp.goal_plan_id AS GOAL_PLAN_ID, gp.goal_plan_type_code AS TYP FROM hrg_goal_plans_b gp JOIN hrg_goal_plans_tl tl ON tl.goal_plan_id=gp.goal_plan_id AND tl.language='US' WHERE tl.goal_plan_name LIKE '${PREFIX}%'
